config.script:
#include "50561"
class nx_form_builder private m_oNXAsp 'nx aspator <- do niego piszemy private m_oNXObjDef private m_iTypeId private m_iFormColSpan private m_strFormUsage
public sub class_initialize() m_iFormColSpan = 2 m_strFormUsage = "" 'default end sub
public sub class_terminate() 'OK end sub
public sub init(byref oNXAsp,byval iTypeId) set m_oNXAsp = oNXAsp m_iTypeId = iTypeId set m_oNXObjDef = nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(iTypeId) end sub
public function write_field_ex(byval strFieldName,byval strUsage) dim oNXFieldDef : set oNXFieldDef = m_oNXObjDef.fields.get_field(strFieldName) dim strFieldBuildVBCode : strFieldBuildVBCode = oNXFieldDef.get_form_builder(m_strFormUsage) if strFieldBuildVBCode = "" then write_stock_field oNXFieldDef else end if
set write_field_ex = me end function
public function begin_form() m_oNXAsp.newtable.newsection "tbody",m_iFormColSpan set begin_form = me end function public function end_form() set m_oNXAsp.table = nothing m_oNXAsp.flush end function
public function begin_flat_section(byval strHumanName) m_oNXAsp.newgroup 1,strHumanName set begin_flat_section = me end function public function end_flat_section() set m_oNXAsp.row_group = nothing set end_flat_section = me end function
public function newrow() set newrow = m_oNXASP.newrow() end function
public function write_field(byval strFieldName) set write_field = write_field_ex(strFieldName,m_strFormUsage) end function
'------------------------------------------------- public property let form_colspan(byval iTotalColSpan) m_iFormColSpan = iTotalColSpan end property
public property let form_usage(byval strFormUsage) m_strFormUsage = strFormUsage end property
public property get nxub_ set nxub_ = m_oNXAsp end property
'------------------------------------------------- private sub write_stock_field(byref oNXFieldDef) select case oNXFieldDef.reltype case RELT_EMBED write_stock_embedded_field oNXFieldDef case RELT_ENUM write_stock_enum_field oNXFieldDef case RELT_REF write_stock_ref_field oNXFieldDef end select end sub
private sub write_stock_embedded_field(byref oNXFieldDef)
select case oNXFieldDef.sqltype case SQLdate m_oNXAsp.c_labelex oNXFieldDef.human_name,oNXFieldDef.required,"" m_oNXAsp.c_date_field oNXFieldDef.name,1 case SQLlong case SQLcurrency m_oNXAsp.c_labelex oNXFieldDef.human_name,oNXFieldDef.required,"" m_oNXAsp.c_currency_field oNXFieldDef.name,12,"",2,1 case else if oNXFieldDef.sqltype < SQLsmall then dim iLength : iLength = control_len_from_sqltype(oNXFieldDef.sqltype) if iLength > 0 then m_oNXAsp.c_labelex oNXFieldDef.human_name,oNXFieldDef.required,"" m_oNXAsp.c_edit_field oNXFieldDef.name,iLength,1 else 'multiline write_stock_multiline_field oNXFieldDef end if end if end select end sub
private function control_len_from_sqltype(byval iSQLType) 'todo: 'zaokraglac' dlugosci aby kazde pole nie mial innej dlugosci na 'formularzu (typoszereg dlugosci pol)
dim iLength iLength = iSQLType if iLength > 8192 then iLength = iLength - 8192 end if if iLength >= 256 then 'multiline iLength = -1 else if iLength > 54 then iLength = 54 end if end if control_len_from_sqltype = iLength end function
private sub write_stock_enum_field(byref oNXFieldDef) m_oNXAsp.c_labelex oNXFieldDef.human_name,oNXFieldDef.required,"" m_oNXAsp.newcell
dim oEnumArray : set oEnumArray = nx_create_enum_array(m_iTypeId,oNXFieldDef.name)
'--------- compute colspan
dim iColSpan : iColSpan = clng(sqr(oEnumArray.count/1.4)) if iColSpan < 1 then iColSpan = 1 else if iColSpan > 5 then iColSpan = 5 end if end if
m_oNXAsp.e_radioex_array oNXFieldDef.name,"style='STYLE_TABLE_BODY' colspan='" + cstr(iColSpan) + "'", oEnumArray
end sub
private sub write_stock_multiline_field(byref oNXFieldDef) 'todo: zwijanie multiline'a to nie sekcja :) 'tylko podobny mechanizm powiekszajacy/zmniejszajacy m_oNXAsp.newnestedgroup 2,oNXFieldDef.human_name m_oNXAsp.newrow m_oNXAsp.newcellex m_iFormColSpan,"" m_oNXAsp.e_multiline_field oNXFieldDef.name,0,0 set m_oNXAsp.row_group = nothing end sub
private sub write_stock_ref_field(byref oNXFieldDef) m_oNXAsp.newcell.e_label_rtlink_open_obj _ oNXFieldDef.human_name,oNXFieldDef.name,oNXFieldDef.required
dim oNXRefObjectDef : set oNXRefObjectDef = oNXFieldDef.get_ref_object(0) dim oNXRefSearchFldDef : set oNXRefSearchFldDef = oNXRefObjectDef.default_search_field dim iLength : iLength = control_len_from_sqltype(oNXRefSearchFldDef.sqltype) if iLength < 0 then iLength = 20 end if
m_oNXAsp.c_edit_ref oNXFieldDef.name, iLength,"-2",NX_CURSOR, _ oNXRefObjectDef.get_picture_id("choice_on_form"),1 end sub end class
function new_nx_form_builder(byref oNXAsp,byval iTypeId) dim oNXFormBuilder : set oNXFormBuilder = new nx_form_builder oNXFormBuilder.init oNXAsp,iTypeId set new_nx_form_builder = oNXFormBuilder end function
